findings.finding: User pasted rendered page text containing raw Vue {{ ... }} template expressions.
findings.meaning: Vue app did not mount, app.js failed, Vue CDN failed, or user copied raw HTML/source instead of rendered browser view.
findings.action_taken: Dashboard browser proof now fails if raw Vue template tokens are visible. Commit 5bbf0151a4cb4c70fb95d2a925e79c3e4472c663.

findings.finding: At 06:58 generate_token returned Dhan rate-limit message: Token can be generated once every 2 minutes. renew_token then failed with DH-906 Invalid Token and OAuth manual fallback was printed.
findings.meaning: Likely overlapping startup/redeploy token refresh or an invalid old DHAN_ACCESS_TOKEN. Not an OOM by itself.
findings.required_action: Suppress automatic manual OAuth fallback in Render cloud mode and throttle duplicate token refresh attempts.

findings.finding: At 06:59 generate_token succeeded and DHAN_ACCESS_TOKEN was set in os.environ cloud mode.
findings.meaning: Broker token auto-refresh can work, but startup overlap/rate-limit handling needs hardening.

findings.finding: Several API calls completed but took 3-5 seconds: /api/state, /api/paper, /api/broker/status, /api/trades/today.
findings.meaning: Dashboard polling can create load spikes on Render starter. Need request coalescing/cache TTL for heavy endpoints.

findings.finding: Instruments loaded from runtime JSON: 143079 rows.
findings.meaning: Large instrument load is a startup memory pressure point. Not proven as leak from the excerpt.

findings.finding: NSE live data fetched for NIFTY/BANKNIFTY/FINNIFTY/MIDCPNIFTY. ML signal CSV not found; ml_confidence_score is 0 and weight redistributed.
findings.meaning: Market data fallback is active; prediction model factor is incomplete for current session.

next_required_fixes: Patch Dhan token manager to avoid manual OAuth printing in Render cloud auto-start path.
Add token refresh cooldown/lock to prevent generate_token calls within 2 minutes.
Run dashboard browser proof after deploy; it must fail if raw {{ ... }} is visible.
Add TTL/cache/coalescing for heavy dashboard endpoints to reduce 3-5s repeated API load.
Collect actual OOM restart log lines if memory issue continues.
